capabilities.name: Send email
capabilities.verify: send_email SkillSeed in email-module.ts (edge:email-send gateway, approve-gated, scope both); SendEmailDialog in src/components/admin/crm/; email-send edge gateway
capabilities.notes: Skill surface restored 2026-07-07. Live-verified via MCP gateway: routes to email-send, approval gate fires (202 pending_approval), lint_skill clean. Simulated-send fallback when no provider configured (Law 4).

capabilities.name: Email templates
capabilities.verify: no email template skill or admin UI; only dunning-specific templates (DunningPage)
capabilities.notes: email_templates table + upsert/delete RPCs. email-send accepts template_name/template_id + variables and renders {{tokens}}. 3 seeded (welcome/invoice_follow_up/sales_follow_up). Admin UI /admin/email → Templates tab.

capabilities.name: Conversation threading
capabilities.verify: no threading skill or UI found
capabilities.notes: email_threads table (subject-normalized key). BEFORE INSERT trigger on outbound_communications derives thread_key, sets thread_id, upserts thread row (last_message_at/message_count). /admin/email → Threads tab groups conversations.

capabilities.name: Signatures
capabilities.verify: no email signature skill or UI (signature matches are contract e-signing)
capabilities.notes: email_signatures table (per-user or per from-address, is_default). email-send appends signature by sender_user_id or matching from-address unless skip_signature. upsert_email_signature RPC + /admin/email → Signatures tab.

capabilities.name: Bounce/complaint handling
capabilities.notes: email_events table + record_email_event RPC. email-webhook edge function normalizes Resend-shaped payloads. AFTER INSERT trigger auto-suppresses hard-bounce/complaint/unsubscribe into email_suppressions. email-send checks suppressions and skips (status=skipped). /admin/email → Suppressions tab.

capabilities.name: Outbound communications audit log
capabilities.notes: Added: cross-channel (email/sms/slack/signing) gateway log with sent/simulated/failed status.

capabilities.name: Email ↔ lead association + contact timeline
capabilities.verify: supabase/migrations/20260703210000_email-lead-association.sql (BEFORE INSERT trigger + backfill on outbound_communications); LeadCommunicationsCard.tsx on LeadDetailPage; useLeadCommunications.ts
capabilities.notes: Runtime-verified on live dev 2026-07-07: INSERT into outbound_communications with a lead's email set related_entity_type='lead'/related_entity_id via trg_associate_comm_with_lead at write time. Skill surface now exists (send_email). Ambiguous multi-lead emails stay unlinked by design.
